summary:
Claim: During tooth tipping, PDL fibers experience both compression and stretching depending on their position relative to the tooth’s movement vector.  

Evidence: - Fibers on the coronal side stretch as the tooth moves distally/apically. - Fibers on the cervical side compress as the tooth moves toward its root end.  

Answer: C
